panels.title: Volume Usage
panels.description: Volume 1/2: usable volumes. Storage Pool 1: HDD (personal). Storage Pool 2: SSD (vSphere iSCSI).

targets.expr: (synology_raid_total_size{job="snmp_nas", raidName="Storage Pool 1"} - synology_raid_free_size{job="snmp_nas", raidName="Storage Pool 1"}) / synology_raid_total_size{job="snmp_nas", raidName="Storage Pool 1"} * 100

(synology_raid_total_size{job="snmp_nas", raidName="Storage Pool 2"} - synology_raid_free_size{job="snmp_nas", raidName="Storage Pool 2"}) / synology_raid_total_size{job="snmp_nas", raidName="Storage Pool 2"} * 100

panels.title: Disk Status
panels.description: Disk 1-2: HDD (Pool 1, Personal). Disk 3-5: SSD (Pool 2, vSphere).
